overview: A premium dark-themed SaaS landing page for RIKNOVA FINTECH SOLUTIONS with glassmorphism effects, cinematic animations, and 11 sections showcasing fintech products and services.
features: Hero section with animated gradient background and floating dashboard mockup
Sticky transparent navigation with smooth scroll
Trusted badges section with glassmorphism cards
About section with mission and vision
Products showcase with Finance Pro flagship
Finance Pro feature grid with interactive elements
Why Choose Us value proposition cards
Testimonials with premium cards and ratings
